description: Legal record (#21) in a court register/pinqas from a Karaite beit din in Cairo (on ff. 8v-9r of Yevr.-Arab. I 328). Dated 7 Tevet [5321] AM (1560 CE). The same year as the preceding entry on 8v is implied by סנה תאר׳. Partnership in cheesemaking with many details on the production process itself, mentioning rennet, animal hide sacks, and various cleaning procedures if blood, worms, or maggots are found during production. The partners are ʿAbd al-Bāqī b. Moshe ha-Levi and Avraham b. Yehuda ha-Rofe. This pinqas entry notes that the partnership was recorded in the home of Shemuʾel ha-Dayyan. For another cheesemaking partnership in the same court register, see: Yevr.-Arab. I 328, folio 19r (PGPID 41186). Another cheesemaking partnership among members of the sixteenth-century Karaite community is attested in Yevr.-Arab. II 1752 (PGPID 28081). MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
